title: NADE Membership Recruitment Grants and Membership Awards
description: Narrative description of NADE's membership recruitment grant and award program. The NADE Board budgets funds annually for recruitment grants; the Membership Director is authorized to grant $50 to individual local chapters to defray recruiting costs, applied for in writing with a stated use of funds. The page also describes membership-committee assistance (ideas, sample letters and posters) and monetary awards recognizing chapters (large/medium/small) that excel at recruiting, presented at Regional and National Conferences, with a link to the awards criteria. Scraped from the official NADE site.

source.title: Membership Recruitment Grants and Membership Awards

notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's members recruitment-grants/awards page (source URL preserved). Notes a specific $50 per-chapter grant amount and links to '2021 NADE Awards Criteria' (not captured here). No date stated on the page; temporal_coverage omitted. Narrative prose, no tabular data.
